description_long: This is a modern bungalow surrounded by a dense arrangement of trees, featuring a flat roof and a clean, rectilinear layout. The structure is composed of multiple interconnected volumes, with large windows and open spaces that suggest an emphasis on natural light and indoor-outdoor flow. The exterior appears to be finished in light-colored materials, likely concrete or stucco, with wooden accents visible on the porch and pergola areas. The landscaping includes a central courtyard and a driveway, with manicured shrubs and pathways leading to the main entrance. The bungalow is single-storied, with a prominent front porch and several outdoor living spaces. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, with an emphasis on horizontal lines and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and wooden accents, surrounded by dense trees and landscaped outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central courtyard, and prominent porch with wooden pergola.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the flat roof, backyard area, and extensive tree coverage.
description_view_2: Back view with dense trees partially obscuring the structure and a clear view of the rear facade.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the driveway, side entrance, and additional outdoor living space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and floor-to-ceiling glass panels
